Let's Talk!
Granular Marketing Programs

Marketing Operations & CRM

Marketing automation, CRM management, and campaign orchestration so your systems run as smoothly as your strategy.

Book a strategy session

Strategy fails quietly when the systems behind it aren't kept up. We run marketing operations as an ongoing discipline inside the client's own HubSpot instance — they own the account, we keep it accurate, automated, and reporting honestly on what's working.

What this looks like

HubSpot Setup, Audit & Ongoing Support

Initial audit and configuration — cleaning lists, configuring pipelines and properties — followed by ongoing support: managing users, updating workflows and automation, troubleshooting, segmentation.

Email Workflows & Nurture Sequences

Automated, multi-email sequences triggered by specific behavior. Each includes copy for every message, designed HTML templates, automation logic with triggers and conditional branches, and tracking.

Standalone Email Campaigns

One-time sends for product announcements, event promotion, campaign activation — copywriting, HTML design, list segmentation, and post-send performance reporting.

Monthly & Partner Newsletters

A recurring branded publication maintaining presence between active campaigns, distributed via email and, where relevant, as a LinkedIn Newsletter. Bilingual (EN/SP) cadences available for LatAm-facing brands.

Landing Pages

Built in Webflow, HubSpot, or your existing CMS — UX layout, copywriting, hero imagery, CTA, form integration, and tracking setup for a single conversion action.

Marketing Compass (Monthly Reporting)

Our proprietary monthly performance report, consolidating every campaign KPI into one readable document — with written commentary on what worked, what didn't, and what's changing next.

Part of Granular Marketing Programs

Keep your systems as sharp as your strategy.

Book a strategy session
